fact_nuggets.text: Scrappy (Japanese: Spunk) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D * Enables the Pokemon to hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. MD T D * Increases the damage inflicted on Ghost-type enemies with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. MD S Increases the damage inflicted on Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD Ghost-type Pokemon can be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type moves! MD RT DX Ghost-type Pokemon can be hit by Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Scrappy enables the Pokemon with this Ability to hit Ghost-type Pokemon with damage-dealing Normal - and Fighting-type moves. From Generation VIII onwards, Scrappy now also grants an immunity to Intimidate . Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Scrappy has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Scrappy enables the Pokemon with this Ability to hit Ghost-type Pokemon with damage-dealing Normal - and Fighting-type moves. From Generation VIII onwards, Scrappy now also grants an immunity to Intimidate .
Lets the Pokemon's normal and fighting moves hit ghost Pokemon.
